Plaintiff'S Motion To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-06-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to post judgment discovery: Granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to provide complete verified responses to interrogatories and request for production without objection within21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $336.30 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. (610/CHAN)
